narrative.headline: What 2018 Nissan Armada owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 73 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (55% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: I WENT OUT TO MY VEHICLE WHICH UNLOCKED WITH MY POD I WENT TO START IT AND ALL THE DASH BOARD LIGHTS CAME ON BUT THE VEHICLE WOULD NOT START. I JUMPED THE BATTERY AND IT STARTED INSTANTLY SO I TOOK THE VEHICLE TO AN AUTO STORE TO CHECK THE BATTERY WHICH THEY STATED WAS A GREAT BA
